name: Sky Dragoons of Draconia
name_jp: ドラコニアの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>翼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>兵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>へい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Once per turn, when a Normal Monster you control inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it.

[ Monster Effect ] 
''Rumored as being formed to invade the neutral, floating Sky-State of Cxulub, these mounted air troops of the Draconia Empire have prompted bordering nations to strengthen their security.''
pend_eff: Once per turn, when a Normal Monster you control inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can target 1 card on the field; destroy it.
flavor: Rumored as being formed to invade the neutral, floating Sky-State of Cxulub, these mounted air troops of the Draconia Empire have prompted bordering nations to strengthen their security.

sets.set: Clash of Rebellions Sneak Peek Participation Card

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
